offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month, inconsistent bid formats cause delays in proposal acceptance. We convert bids into standardized proposals instead of manual proposal creation using word processors or spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent bid formats lead to confusion and delays in proposal acceptance.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on proposal workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing construction tools
try_it: Let users try template-based proposal generation and editable sections for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
